div.h1: Tiled Transpose Algorithm: GPU Memory Path Architecture

p.strong: sizeof(tile) = 32 * 33 * 4 bytes = 4224 bytes (approx. 1.03 L1 Cache Lines)
p.em: Optimized for Bank Conflict Avoidance via Padding

g.text: GPU Compute TDD-006 | Intel-Style Technical Specification | Revision 1.4

g.title: Each thread reads 4-bytes, contiguous across warp
Ensure all threads finished writing to shared memory
Threads write contiguous 128B block to Global Memory

g.text: __global__ void transpose(float* o, float* i, int w, int h) {

text.tspan: // 32x32 data + 1 col padding to shift bank alignment

g.text: int tx = threadIdx.x; int ty = threadIdx.y;

text.tspan: // 32x32 data + 1 col padding to shift bank alignment

div.p: Without padding ([32][32]), tile[i][0] and tile[i+1][0] hit Bank 0, causing a 32-way conflict.
With [32][33]: Address(ty, tx) = ty * 33 + tx Bank = (ty * 33 + tx) % 32
This ensures that columns mapped to the same warp access distinct banks.

g.title: Each thread reads 4-bytes, contiguous across warp
Ensure all threads finished writing to shared memory
Threads write contiguous 128B block to Global Memory
